text: fal'Cieは、誰もが自分の環境で実行し、検証し、改良できるオープンウェイト言語モデルを目指します。
fal'Cie aims to become a frontier-grade open-weight language model that researchers and builders can run, inspect, fine-tune, and own.
評価 harness は README、model card、training config、data manifest を同じ commit SHA に紐づけます。
def load_manifest(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))\n

## Release Gate

- Evaluation report complete
- Model card complete
- Checksums published
